etymology.description: Variant form of 西(西) (xī, "west") depicting a simplified version of a basket (original phonetic origin) with an added horizontal stroke
etymology.interpretation: 覀(yà) is an alternate form of 西(西) (xī, "west"), primarily used in compound characters but relatively uncommon on its own. It retains the essence of the character 西, representing the concept of the west.
